meaning: adj.明确无误的,清晰生动地
examples: They managed to leave without any of us realizing.
He rushed home, realizing there was no time to lose.
She carried on merrily, not realizing the offence she was causing.
Mr. JOHN LEE (Investor): People are realizing that they have to take control of their money.
He says he fired in a fit of terror before realizing Steenkamp was inside.
